text:
The following persons and their agents are exempt from the licensing and other requirements established by this subchapter:

(1) a franchised motor vehicle dealer or independent motor vehicle dealer who holds a general distinguishing number issued by the department under Chapter 503 (Dealer’s and Manufacturer’s Vehicle License Plates) ;

(2) a vehicle lessor holding a license issued by the department under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code, or a trust or other entity that is specifically not required to obtain a lessor license under Section 2301.254(a) of that code; and

(3) a vehicle lease facilitator holding a license issued by the department under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.063 — Exemptions

The following persons and their agents are exempt from the licensing and other requirements established by this subchapter:

    (1) a franchised motor vehicle dealer or independent motor vehicle dealer who holds a general distinguishing number issued by the department under Chapter 503 (Dealer’s and Manufacturer’s Vehicle License Plates) ;

    (2) a vehicle lessor holding a license issued by the department under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code, or a trust or other entity that is specifically not required to obtain a lessor license under Section 2301.254(a) of that code; and

    (3) a vehicle lease facilitator holding a license issued by the department under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 276 (H.B.3514), Sec. 12, eff. September 1, 2021.*

a franchised motor vehicle dealer or independent motor vehicle dealer who holds a general distinguishing number issued by the department under Chapter 503 (Dealer’s and Manufacturer’s Vehicle License Plates) ;

a vehicle lessor holding a license issued by the department under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code, or a trust or other entity that is specifically not required to obtain a lessor license under Section 2301.254(a) of that code; and
a vehicle lease facilitator holding a license issued by the department under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code.
